quote: You control the code you write, not the outcomes it meets in the world. Master the former. Accept the latter. Build anyway.
principles: Simplicity over complexity — the simplest system that works is the correct one.
Build with purpose — every component should earn its place.
Automate repetitive work — human attention is the scarce resource.
Continuous learning — the field moves fast; discipline keeps up without chasing hype.
Engineering over hype — judge systems by what they do, not what they promise.
